ddls:
CREATE TABLE "components" (
  "component_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each component */,
  "component_name" TEXT /* Name of the component */,
  "component_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of component */,
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the manufacturer of the component */,
  "part_number" TEXT /* Part number of the component */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the component */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version number of the component */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the component was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the component was last updated */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category of the component */,
  "datasheet_url" TEXT /* URL to the component's datasheet */,
  "stock_quantity" INTEGER /* Current stock quantity of the component */,
  "lead_time" TEXT /* Lead time for component delivery */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the component (e.g., active, obsolete) */,
  "last_inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the last quality inspection */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_components_manufacturer_id FOREIGN KEY ("manufacturer_id") REFERENCES manufacturers ("manufacturer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_components_component_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_type_id") REFERENCES component_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "component_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each component type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the component type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the component type */,
  "parent_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent type for hierarchical categorization */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the component type is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "manufacturers" (
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each manufacturer */,
  "manufacturer_name" TEXT /* Name of the manufacturer */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the manufacturer */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the manufacturer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the manufacturer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the manufacturer */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the manufacturer is located */,
  "is_preferred" INTEGER /* Indicates if the manufacturer is a preferred supplier */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manufacturer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "project_description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "project_manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project manager */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the project (e.g., active, completed) */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the project (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_project_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_manager_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "component_usage" (
  "usage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each usage event */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component used */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project where the component is used */,
  "quantity_used" INTEGER /* Quantity of the component used */,
  "usage_date" TEXT /* Date when the component was used */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the usage */,
  "approved_by" TEXT /* User who approved the usage */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* Date when the usage was approved */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the usage (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("usage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_usage_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_usage_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, manager, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the component */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the component details were accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access */,
  "duration" REAL /* Duration of the access session in minutes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "technical_documents" (
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component the document belongs to */,
  "doc_type" TEXT /* Type of the document (e.g., datasheet, application note) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the document */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the document in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the document was uploaded */,
  "uploaded_by" TEXT /* User who uploaded the document */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the document */,
  "is_confidential" INTEGER /* Indicates if the document is confidential */,
  "download_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the document has been downloaded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("doc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_technical_documents_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "version_history" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version change */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component whose version was changed */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the component */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes made */,
  "changed_by" TEXT /* User who made the changes */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the changes were made */,
  "rollback_option" INTEGER /* Option to rollback to this version */,
  "is_major_change" INTEGER /* Indicates if the change is a major update */,
  "approval_status" TEXT /* Status of the version change approval (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_version_history_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id")
)
